canonical_actions.instruction: Move away from exposure and remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Stops continued skin contact.

canonical_actions.instruction: Wash the exposed skin with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Reduces chemical residue on skin.

canonical_actions.instruction: Contact a physician or poison control center immediately.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Source requires direct medical escalation.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not keep wearing contaminated clothing or shoes.

escalation_triggers.condition: Any confirmed skin exposure to the concentrate or spray mix.
escalation_triggers.required_action: Call a physician or poison control center immediately after rinsing starts.

canonical_actions.instruction: Hold the eye open and rinse gently with clean water for 15-20 minutes.

canonical_actions.instruction: Remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes if present.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Improves continued rinsing.

canonical_actions.instruction: Call a physician or poison control center immediately.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Source requires direct medical escalation.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not stop rinsing early.

canonical_actions.instruction: Hold the eyelids apart and flush the eyes continuously with running water.

canonical_actions.instruction: Remove contact lenses if present.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Source explicitly includes lens removal.

canonical_actions.instruction: Continue flushing for at least 15 minutes or until a doctor or poison center tells you to stop.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Duration and stop condition are source-backed.

canonical_actions.instruction: Seek immediate medical attention.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Immediate escalation is required.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not stop flushing early without medical direction.

escalation_triggers.required_action: Seek immediate medical attention after flushing starts.

scenario_metadata.context: paraquat spray mist was inhaled during application and the worker feels unwell

canonical_actions.instruction: Call a poison control center or doctor immediately for treatment advice.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: The source makes immediate medical contact the first action and stresses speed.

canonical_actions.instruction: If available, give an absorbent such as activated charcoal, bentonite, or Fuller’s Earth.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: The source explicitly recommends an absorbent if available.

canonical_actions.instruction: Have the person sip a glass of water if able to swallow.
canonical_actions.rationale_short: Water is allowed only if swallowing is possible.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not induce vomiting unless told to by a poison control center or doctor.
Do not give anything by mouth to an unconscious person.

escalation_triggers.required_action: Treat as an immediate medical emergency and call a poison control center or doctor at once.

scenario_metadata.context: paraquat entered the mouth during handling or transfer

scenario_families.notes: The SDS says speed is essential and immediate medical attention is required; this family should remain high-severity in scoring.
